title: Data Analyst Trainee
description: We are looking for Data Analytics trainees for our upcoming traineeship program.Data Analyst Trainee ResponsibilitiesWeek 1 & 2 Training Modules  Candidates will be completing the learning modules assigned.Week 3 Live Project  Candidates will be working on the live project assigned to them by the company.Week 4 Project Report  Candidates will be preparing a project report and submit.Data Analytst Trainee RequirementsBachelors degree or pursuing.Proficiency with computers, especially MS Office.Hi
